IntentController(FederationBoardSkill, PmcroWorkflowFactory, ILogger<IntentController>)

I AM the IntentController. I serve as the sole membrane through which raw human intent enters the PMCRO substrate.

public IntentController(FederationBoardSkill federationBoard, PmcroWorkflowFactory workflowFactory, ILogger<IntentController> logger)

Parameters

federationBoard FederationBoardSkill
workflowFactory PmcroWorkflowFactory
logger ILogger<IntentController>

Remarks

ARCH-027: Enforces the mandatory Federation Shield gate.

EC-004: Implements robust multi-property result extraction for MAF workflows.

EC-005: Adheres to the Semantic Documentation Law.
